intended_use: The Dreem 3S is intended for prescription use to measure, record, display, transmit and analyze the electrical activity of the brain to assess sleep and awake in the home or healthcare environment. Th
intended_use_full: The Dreem 3S is intended for prescription use to measure, record, display, transmit and analyze the electrical activity of the brain to assess sleep and awake in the home or healthcare environment. The Dreem 3S can also output a hypnogram of sleep scoring by 30-second epoch and summary of sleep metrics derived from this hypnogram. The Dreem 3S is used for the assessment of sleep on adult individuals (22 to 65 years old).
ground_truth: Consensus expert-scored sleep stages from a 510(k)-cleared PSG system
other_metrics: Wake: 90.7% epoch-level agreement, 88.5% subject-level positive agreement (85.1%-91.3% CI); N1: 55.2% epoch-level, 58.0% subject-level (52.7%-63.0% CI); N2: 83.7% epoch-level, 83.4% subject-level (80.7%-85.7% CI); N3: 97.8% epoch-level, 98.2% subject-level (96.73%-99.3% CI); REM: 90.7% epoch-level, 91.57% subject-level (86.63%-95.72% CI); EEG data quality: 96.6% of epochs acceptable for manual scoring
